title: TZ-9 load experience
objective:
Create file governance/runtime/experience_loader.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path

def load_experience(path: str = "governance/registries/experience_registry.json") -> dict:
    p = Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {"status":"missing","path":path,"items":[]}
    data = json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    if isinstance(data, dict):
        return {"status":"loaded","path":path,"data":data}
    return {"status":"loaded","path":path,"data":{"items":data}}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(json.dumps(load_experience(), ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True))
Create file governance/runners/analyst_experience_stage_runner.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from governance.runtime.experience_loader import load_experience

RUNNER_ID = "analyst_experience_stage_runner"
READINESS_LEVEL = "FUNCTIONAL"

def main() -> int:
    experience = load_experience()
    print(json.dumps({"runner_id":RUNNER_ID,"readiness_level":READINESS_LEVEL,"status":"experience_loaded","release_pass":False,"experience_status":experience.get("status")}, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
